sprint.name: X-Axis Renderer Unification
sprint.description: Unify X-axis rendering to match Y-axis theming and styling. This sprint addresses the visual inconsistency where X-axis has plain black ticks/labels while Y-axis uses themed colors from series.

phases.name: Setup & Foundational
phases.description: Create file stubs, test infrastructure, and foundational XAxisConfig/XAxisPainter classes with TDD

phases.name: US1: Themed X-Axis Rendering (P1 MVP)
phases.description: Core deliverable - X-axis renders with same visual styling as Y-axis

phases.name: US2: Themed Crosshair X-Value Label (P1)
phases.description: Crosshair X-value label matches Y-axis label styling

phases.name: US3 & US4: Config API + Integration (P2)
phases.description: Full XAxisConfig API and backward compatibility verification

phases.name: Polish & Verification
phases.description: Final quality gates, visual verification, documentation

tasks.title: RED: Write failing tests for XAxisConfig and XAxisPainter foundation
tasks.description: Write comprehensive unit tests for XAxisConfig (17 properties, validation, computed properties) and XAxisPainter structure. Tests MUST FAIL.

tasks.title: GREEN: Implement XAxisConfig and XAxisPainter foundation
tasks.description: Implement XAxisConfig with all 17 properties matching YAxisConfig pattern. Implement XAxisPainter shell with stub methods.

tasks.title: RED: Write failing tests for themed X-axis rendering
tasks.description: Write unit tests for resolveAxisColor(), generateTicks(), formatTickLabel(), paint() methods. Write integration test verifying XAxisPainter.paint() is called from ChartRenderBox. Tests MUST FAIL.

tasks.title: GREEN: Implement themed X-axis rendering (MVP)
tasks.description: Implement resolveAxisColor() using AxisColorResolver pattern, generateTicks() with nice-number algorithm, formatTickLabel(), paint() with actual canvas drawing. Wire XAxisPainter into ChartRenderBox and bypass legacy XAxisRenderer.

tasks.title: US1 Visual Verification Demo
tasks.description: Create x_axis_theming_demo.dart showing themed X-axis matching Y-axis styling. Run and capture screenshot for visual verification.

tasks.title: RED: Write failing tests for themed crosshair X-value label
tasks.description: Write unit tests for CrosshairRenderer accepting xAxisConfig, themed background (alpha 0.15), themed border (alpha 0.6), value-only format. Write integration test for config flow. Tests MUST FAIL.

tasks.title: GREEN: Implement themed crosshair X-value label
tasks.description: Modify CrosshairRenderer.paint() signature to accept xAxisConfig (NOT constructor - it's const). Update X-value label styling to match Y-axis pattern. Pass XAxisConfig from ChartRenderBox.

tasks.title: RED: Write failing tests for XAxisConfig API and backward compatibility
tasks.description: Write property verification tests for all 17 properties affecting rendering. Write backward compatibility tests for charts without XAxisConfig. Tests MUST FAIL.

tasks.title: GREEN: Implement full XAxisConfig API and ensure backward compatibility
tasks.description: Verify all 17 properties are documented and affect rendering. Implement axis title with labelDisplay modes. Handle missing XAxisConfig gracefully. Deprecate legacy XAxisRenderer.

tasks.title: Final Quality Gates and Documentation
tasks.description: Run flutter analyze on all modified files. Verify integration requirements (paint() called, no legacy renderer). Run all tests. Visual verification with screenshot. Update CHANGELOG.md.

critical_integration_checks.$comment: These checks prevent the Sprint 017 failure mode

checks.description: Legacy XAxisRenderer not used for rendering

success_criteria: SC-001: X-axis visually matches Y-axis styling (same color, same label box style)
SC-002: Crosshair X-value label shows value-only format (no 'X:' prefix)
SC-003: Crosshair X-value label has semi-transparent themed background
SC-004: All 17 XAxisConfig properties affect rendering
SC-005: Existing charts render correctly without code changes
SC-006: XAxisPainter.paint() is called from ChartRenderBox (integration test)
SC-007: Legacy XAxisRenderer is not used for rendering
notes: Sprint 017 failed 5 times because XAxisPainter was created but paint() was never called
This sprint has explicit integration checks (INT-001 to INT-004) to prevent that failure
CrosshairRenderer is static const - cannot store state, must pass xAxisConfig via paint() params
Reuse AxisColorResolver pattern for color resolution - do not reinvent
Copy _niceNum() and cache invalidation patterns from MultiAxisPainter
